## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Pavilion and Marcel Santilli's AI-driven content and growth services.](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pavilion runs a successful AI for GTM mastery program with 750+ registrants, seeking to contextualize AI applications for GTM leaders](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Marcel's company offers AI-powered content creation and growth services, recently reaching $6M ARR and closing Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Potential collaboration opportunities include Marcel conducting a seminar for Pavilion's program and exploring partnership options](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

## Topics

### Pavilion's AI for GTM Mastery Program

  - [Year-long program with 4 courses, seminars, fireside chats, and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [First course on AI and automation strategies for GTM leaders](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [750+ registrants, 100+ certificates issued](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Challenges in balancing depth for diverse audience (CROs to RevOps managers)](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

### Marcel's Background and Expertise

  - [Built successful content sites for IBM and HP, driving significant pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Leadership roles at HashiCorp (6M to 100M ARR), Skale AI (100M to 300M ARR in 2 years)](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Organized major AI conferences with high-profile speakers (Sam Altman, Andrew Ng, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Developed AI workflows at DeepGram, increasing traffic 24x](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Currently running AI-powered content and growth services company](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

### AI-Powered Content Creation and Growth Services

  - [Offers full-service approach: strategy, AI workflows, and human experts](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Reached \~$6M ARR, bootstrapped and profitable](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Closing Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - Platform features:
      - [Research agents for topic exploration and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Custom-built runtime layer for managing large-scale AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
      - [Repurposing capabilities (e.g., podcasts to written content, content to LinkedIn posts)](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

### Differentiation from Point Solutions

  - [Focuses on outcomes rather than just providing tools](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Addresses pain points of tool integration and adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise for better results](https://fathom.video/share/UzzuTSisxqQ6sQJVdk9JXSGgYVABmKgf?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
